notes: Small 11-theorem file providing the composition law for [m]∘[n]=[m*n] isogenies: unconditional identity cases, a witness-parametric reduction to pullback/generator data, and several concrete [-1]/[1] x-coordinate composition instances as scaffolding for T-III-4-020b. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats. The declarations mulByInt_pullback_x_neg_one and mulByInt_x_neg are heavily referenced externally (Frobenius.lean, Differential.lean, etc.) but have limited intra-file cross-reference (no declaration is used by 3+ others within this file).
